name: PirateWar
short_description: piratewar is an fps/tps game. Kill your enemies and win.
detailed_description:
Use a variety of weapons and abilities to subdue your enemies and challenge yourself to become the legendary pirate king.
Real-time PvP battles.

move - w, a, s, d
Throw Grenade - t
Fast Move - Shift
Crouch - alt
Change Weapon, Equipped Weapon - E
Attack - Left Mouse Click

If the game doesn't start because there's no one around, please send me an email with the available game time. Play with me.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese
